---
title: "Welcome to my website!"
subtitle: "Keily Perla"
echo: false
---


**What you'll find while you're here:**

I'm currently a graduate student at Boston University, pursuing my master's degree in Applied Business Analytics. As you make your way through my website, you'll learn more about my educational and professional background. 

![](./images/IMG_5850.jpg){width="50%" fig-align="center"}



**Out in the Wild**

When I'm not on campus or in the office, here's where you might find me:

Traveling, running, reading, or trying a new coffee spot!

::: columns

::: {.column width="33%"}
![](./images/IMG_6069.jpg){style="border-radius:60%;" fig-align="center" width="150"}
:::

::: {.column width="33%"}
![](./images/IMG_3417.jpg){style="border-radius:60%;" fig-align="center" width="150"}
:::

::: {.column width="33%"}
![](./images/IMG_6092 (1).jpg){style="border-radius:60%;" fig-align="center" width="150"}
:::

:::

::: columns

::: {.column width="33%"}
![](./images/IMG_5772.jpg){style="border-radius:60%;" fig-align="center" width="150"}
:::

::: {.column width="33%"}
![](./images/IMG_5776.jpg){style="border-radius:60%;" fig-align="center" width="150"}
:::

::: {.column width="33%"}
![](./images/IMG_6077.jpg){style="border-radius:60%;" fig-align="center" width="150"}
:::

:::
